name: FounderAttestation
description: Organizer or steward attestation. Issued by RegenHub, LCA to founding participants, core contributors, and platform stewards. Permanent — does not decay.

fields.name: issuedBy
fields.description: RegenHub, LCA multisig or steward address

notes: Permanent. Does not decay. Extremely rare — fewer than 20 expected in Season 1. Role field allows differentiation between steward types.
